povFilter: Jaina's arcane-scholarly lens: notices notation systems, ward patterns, institutional parallels, arcane terminology. Does NOT notice tactical geometry or ambush positions (reserved for Sylvanas POV).
growthNotes: Original was already partially grounded (green fungi, chalk-filmed slate, specimen jars, cold dry air). Growth at low end of 40-70% range reflects this pre-existing specificity. Main additions: institutional naming, material textures, physical beats between long dialogue stretches, Scholomance architectural vocabulary.
